task_completion.description: Open the MedinTux address book or correspondent management interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The MedinTux application is open and displaying the address book, contacts, or 'correspondants' window.

task_completion.description: Enter the correspondent's first and last name
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name fields are populated with 'MARTIN' (Last Name / Nom) and 'Sophie' (First Name / Prénom).
The specialty, profession, or title field contains 'Cardiologie' or 'Cardiologue'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correspondent's physical address details
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields are populated with 'Place du Dr Baylac' for the street, '31300' for the postal code (CP), and 'Toulouse' for the city (Ville).
The phone number field (Téléphone) is populated with '05 61 77 22 33' or '0561772233'.

task_completion.description: Save the new correspondent to the address book
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/validate button is clicked, a success message is shown, or the newly created profile for Dr. Sophie MARTIN is visible in the saved list of correspondents.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the MedinTux graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the actual MedinTux application windows and forms, not terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the details into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the specific input fields of the MedinTux software, not a generic text editor like Notepad or Gedit.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the entry rather than just filling out the form and stopping
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved record in the address book list or a clear confirmation of the save action, rather than just an unsaved, filled-out form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must enter the following verified details into the MedinTux address book: Last Name: MARTIN, First Name: Sophie, City: Toulouse, Postal Code: 31300, Phone: 0561772233 (or 05 61 77 22 33). Note: While the real Dr. Sophie Martin in Toulouse is a general practitioner, the task explicitly requires setting her specialty to 'Cardiologie' at the CHU Toulouse Purpan address (Place du Dr Baylac).
